((vertical sleeve gastrectom*[tiab] OR sleeve gastrectom*[tiab] OR gastric sleeve[tiab] OR laparoscopic sleeve[tiab] OR LSG[tiab] OR VSG[tiab]) AND ((DeMeester[tiab] OR "DeMeester score"[tiab] OR "DeMeester index"[tiab]) OR (("lower esophageal sphincter"[tiab] OR "lower oesophageal sphincter"[tiab] OR LES[tiab] OR "esophagogastric junction"[tiab] OR EGJ[tiab]) AND (pressur*[tiab] OR length[tiab] OR manometr*[tiab] OR "high-resolution manometry"[tiab] OR HRM[tiab])) OR "Esophageal Manometry"[Mesh] OR "pH Monitoring, Esophageal"[Mesh]) AND ((preoperativ*[tiab] AND postoperativ*[tiab]) OR "before and after"[tiab] OR "pre and post"[tiab] OR pre-post[tiab] OR "pre/post"[tiab] OR paired[tiab] OR longitudinal[tiab]) AND (randomized controlled trial[pt] OR controlled clinical trial[pt] OR cohort studies[Mesh] OR prospective studies[Mesh] OR retrospective studies[Mesh] OR longitudinal studies[Mesh] OR follow-up studies[Mesh] OR "Observational Study"[Publication Type] OR "case-control studies"[Mesh]) NOT (animals[MeSH Terms] NOT humans[MeSH Terms])

inclusion_criteria: Study design: randomized trials, prospective or retrospective cohorts, or pre-post observational studies that compare outcomes before and after LVSG in the same patients
Population: adults (>=18 years) with morbid obesity undergoing primary laparoscopic vertical sleeve gastrectomy
Intervention/comparator: LVSG with preoperative baseline measurements serving as the comparator
Outcomes: reports at least one esophageal physiologic metric (LESP, LESL, or DeMeester score); BMI change may be reported additionally
exclusion_criteria: Non-original or non-comparative evidence: reviews, editorials, letters, conference abstracts, case reports/series without pre-post data, or animal/in vitro studies

Wrong population/intervention: pediatric cohorts (<18 years), bariatric procedures other than LVSG, mixed-procedure cohorts without separable LVSG data, revisional LVSG, or concurrent anti-reflux/hiatal hernia procedures without separable LVSG-only data
No appropriate comparator: studies lacking preoperative baseline data for the same LVSG cohort
Outcomes not relevant: studies that do not report LESP, LESL, or DeMeester score
screening_criteria.description: Screening focuses on adult patients with morbid obesity undergoing primary LVSG, using study designs that provide pre- vs post-operative comparisons and reporting esophageal physiologic outcomes relevant to LES function; excludes non-original evidence, wrong populations/interventions, missing preoperative comparators, or absent esophageal outcomes.
